signals.headline: wXRP Officially Launches on Solana Network via Hex Trust and LayerZero, Driving XRP Price Surge to $1
signals.raw:
wXRP Officially Launches on Solana Network via Hex Trust and LayerZero, Driving XRP Price Surge to $1.50 and Boosting SOL Gains | YES | HIGH**  
XRP has launched as wrapped wXRP (1:1 backed and fully redeemable) on Solana, enabling DeFi access on platforms like Jupiter Exchange, Meteora, Titan Exchange, Phantom Wallet, and Byreal, with over $100M initial liquidity.[1][3]

signals.headline: Cooper Flagg scores 45 points in Mavericks' win over Lakers, bolstering NBA Rookie of the Year case | YES | MED confiden
signals.raw:
Cooper Flagg scores 45 points in Mavericks' win over Lakers, bolstering NBA Rookie of the Year case | YES | MED confidence**  
Flagg's 45 points, nine assists, and eight rebounds on April 5, 2026, marked back-to-back 40+ point games (after 51 vs. Magic), a feat matching Allen Iverson as the first rookie since 1996-97, tightening his race with frontrunner Kon Knueppel (-350 odds vs. Flagg +250).[1]
